title: Blueno Blocks the Path
description: The fight across Enies Lobby widens as guards, giants, CP9, Franky, and the Straw Hats collide around the courthouse.
scene: Across pages 17, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. The fight across Enies Lobby widens as guards, giants, CP9, Franky, and the Straw Hats collide around the courthouse.
summary: The fight across Enies Lobby widens as guards, giants, CP9, Franky, and the Straw Hats collide around the courthouse.
